title: SecondBrain Governing Graph Document
description: The governing node/edge graph document a SecondBrain fold's `summary` interchange line (second-brain-interchange.contract.json) commits (ledger row P520, ADR-006). This is the successor's OWN in-tree, versioned schema for the graph shape that authority holds once governed emit succeeds — not a reference to, or dependency on, the out-of-repo SecondBrain fold engine (math-KG-excluded). Envelope-level shape only: `nodeCount`/`edgeCount` matching `nodes.length`/`edges.length`, and every edge's `from`/`to` resolving to a declared node, are cross-field checks the successor's minimal schema-validator subset cannot express (no `oneOf`/`if`-`then`, no array-length-vs-integer-field comparison) — src/memory/second-brain-validate.ts enforces both. Runtime-neutral.

nodeCount.description: Must equal nodes.length (src/memory/second-brain-validate.ts, not expressible in this schema's minimal subset).

edgeCount.description: Must equal edges.length (src/memory/second-brain-validate.ts, not expressible in this schema's minimal subset).
